params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color. Put an unlock counter on CARDNAME. (To collect evidence 3, exile cards with total mana value 3 or greater from your graveyard.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color. Put an unlock counter on CARDNAME. (To collect evidence 3, exile cards with total mana value 3 or greater from your graveyard.)
Surveil 3, then draw three cards. Activate only if CARDNAME has five or more unlock counters on it.
